violations.text: Ice was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. -Reviewed proper uses of hand sink with PIC and PIC communicated review with employees Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front of the establishment, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025

Wet/damp wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. -Per PIC wet/damp wiping cloths shall be placed in the laundry after each use. -PIC placed wet/damp wiping cloths in laundry. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025
The non-food contact surface of the walk-in cooler floor mat has an accumulation of residue. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025
The mop sink was observed with a continuous leak. Per PIC the shut off valve was broken. PIC placed service order at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the following was observed with an accumulation of debris: -Inside of beverage cooler had an accumulation of food debris -Inside of lemonade cooler had an accumulation of bio-film -The doors of the refrigeration units near the chicken fillet station had an accumulation of food debris -The floors of the walk-in freezer had an accumulation of frozen food debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023

The dumpster area had an accumulation of food debris and grease. Per PIC, current dumpster is too small and can lead to overflow of refuse. Garbage company has been contacted for a larger dumpster. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023
